principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss Print Design with Automotive Utility.
Emotion First: Trust and Efficiency (Clinical Red/White).
Content is King: Data clarity over decoration.
Contrast: High contrast Red/White for readability and urgency control.

technical_stack.js: Vanilla JS or Alpine.js (for interactions like photo preview)
technical_stack.note: IGNORE existing React frontend. Build a pure Django app.

container.class: min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex flex-col font-sans text-gray-900

mobile_wrapper.class: w-full max-w-md mx-auto bg-white min-h-screen shadow-xl overflow-hidden relative

header.class: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-gray-100 p-4 flex justify-between items-center
header.logo_class: text-xl font-black text-red-600 tracking-tighter uppercase font-heading

button_primary.class: w-full bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white font-bold py-3.5 px-4 rounded-lg transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-md shadow-red-200

button_secondary.class: w-full bg-white border-2 border-red-100 hover:border-red-600 text-red-600 font-bold py-3 px-4 rounded-lg transition-colors

input_field.class: w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 text-gray-900 text-base rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500 focus:border-red-500 block p-3 transition-all placeholder-gray-400

card.class: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

bottom_nav.class: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white border-t border-gray-200 p-3 flex justify-around items-center max-w-md mx-auto z-40

auth_screen.structure: Centered content, Logo top, Phone input middle, Button bottom

dashboard_screen.structure: Header (Logo), List of 'My Calculations' (Cards), Floating Action Button (FAB) or Header Action to create new

form_screen.structure: Stepper header, Scrollable form content, Sticky bottom Submit button

images.desc: Minimalist white car detail for auth background
Clean car wireframe for empty lists

universal_guidelines: Mobile First: Always wrap content in 'max-w-md mx-auto' to simulate an app interface.
Thumb Zone: Place primary actions (Save, Submit, Continue) at the bottom of the screen.
Feedback: Use specific Django messages for success/error (e.g., 'SMS Sent', 'Calculation Saved').
Typography: Use 'Chivo' (Google Font) for headings to give it an automotive/industrial feel. Use 'Inter' for UI text.
Spacing: Use 'p-6' and 'gap-4' generously. Don't crowd the inputs.
Testing: Add 'data-testid' to all inputs and buttons.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IGNORE the existing '/app/frontend' React structure. It is irrelevant for this task.
2. SETUP Django: Create a new Django project in '/app/backend' or root. Install 'django', 'django-crispy-forms', 'crispy-tailwind'.
3. TEMPLATES: Create a '/templates' directory and configure Django settings to use it.
4. BASE TEMPLATE: Create 'base.html' with Tailwind CDN: <script src='https://cdn.tailwindcss.com'></script> and Google Fonts.
5. AUTH: Implement simple view-based auth with session. Mock the SMS verification (e.g., code is always '1234' or printed to console).
6. FORM: Use ModelForm for the Damage Assessment. Use 'crispy_forms_tags' to render it with Tailwind classes OR manually render fields with the classes defined in 'components'.
7. STATIC: Use 'whitenoise' if needed, or just serve media files (uploaded photos) using standard Django development settings.
